title: Case-Shiller Home Prices Soar in October
text: We embark on a holiday-shortened trading week this Tuesday — Happy Holidays, all! — feeling a little sleepy still; we don't expect high trading volume today or through the end of the year, per normal seasonality.

title: 3 'Dividend Divas' To Help You Sleep Well At Night
text: Dividend stocks have been punished in 2023, underperforming growth stocks and facing competition from high-yield savings accounts. The Equal Weight S&P 500 has seen a recent broadening of the rally, creating potential opportunities for beaten-down dividend stocks. Just before publishing this article, I decided to buy all three of these dividend divas.

title: ADP to Announce Second Quarter Fiscal 2024 Financial Results on January 31, 2024
text: ROSELAND, N.J. , Dec. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- ADP (Nasdaq: ADP), a leading global provider of Human Capital Management (HCM) solutions, is scheduled to release its financial results for the second fiscal quarter ending December 31, 2023 before the opening of the Nasdaq on Wednesday, January 31, 2024.

title: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Could Be a Great Choice
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Automatic Data Processing (ADP) have what it takes?

title: Get Rich With This Boring but Unstoppable Stock
text: Automatic Data Processing drives steady revenue and earnings growth in nearly any environment. A strong stock-buyback program is quietly adding value above and beyond the sales and dividend growth.

title: 12 Stocks I Hope To Buy If The Market Crashes
text: I've been stockpiling cash for real estate transactions and not actively buying stocks in the market. I aim to have a cash position for the next bear market and am not finding many attractive buying opportunities currently. Here's my list of high conviction long-term bullish picks that I'd like to buy during a market downturn.

title: ADP Named Market Leader in Global Payroll by Everest Group, NelsonHall and Ventana Research
text: Three Major Industry Analyst Rankings Highlight ADP's Strengths in Geography, Technology, Customer Experience and Analytics ROSELAND, N.J. , Dec. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- In three separate recent reports by leading industry analysts, ADP was recognized as an exceptional Leader in the global and North American payroll markets.

title: ADP Reimagines the Human Capital Management Client Experience with Salesforce Generative AI
text: SAN FRANCISCO & ROSELAND, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the #1 AI CRM, and ADP (Nasdaq: ADP), a leading global technology company providing human capital management (HCM) solutions, announced the expansion of their work together to reimagine ADP's client experience for ADP's more than 1 million clients. Together, ADP and Salesforce will unite ADP's data and insights, decades of HCM expertise, and an unmatched approach to service with Salesforce's Customer 360 platform to.

title: Hourly Wages Higher Than Expected
text: The big Employment Report for November — consisting of nonfarm payrolls from the establishment and the household survey from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) — is out this morning, capping off this month's Jobs Week following JOLTS data, ADP ADP private-sector payrolls and Weekly Jobless Claims throughout this past week. Headline 199K new jobs filled last month is somewhat higher than expectations, and a big jump from the unrevised 150K posted a month ago.

title: BLS Shows 199K New Jobs; Unemployment Down to 3.7%
text: This 199K figure is roughly in the median of the past several months, which had been roughly double during the Great Reopening period.

title: Lululemon, Broadcom Beat After-Hours; Jobs Report Tomorrow
text: Tomorrow morning is the big Employment Situation report, expected to bring in 190K new jobs for November.

title: Q3 Productivity Increased More Than Expected
text: Good news hits the tape this Hump Day on economic data across the board — when's the last time we said that? Pre-market futures are ebbing upward on the news from Automatic Data Processing ADP private-sector payrolls, a revision to Q3 Productivity and an October Trade Balance.

title: ADP 103K, Productivity +5.2%: Goldilocks-Adjacent
text: At roughly 100K private-sector job gains per month, we're still on track for a soft landing in the overall economy.

title: Gold prices see new bullish momentum after ADP says U.S. economy created 103K private-sector jobs
text: (Kitco News) - The gold market is seeing renewed buying momentum as the U.S. labor market lost significant momentum last month, according to the latest data from private-sector payrolls processor ADP.

title: Wall Street Awaits Jobs Data
text: Here in this first full week of December, we're beginning to see something of a re-think in the markets following a robust November that brought new year-to-date highs everywhere but the small-cap Russell 2000 index. While Friday, December 1st was a strong continuation of bullish sentiment, yesterday pitched a downward shift during the morning trading hours before fighting back somewhat; this morning we may be testing those lows.

title: 7 Stocks That Your Grandchildren Will Be Glad You Bought for Them
text: This holiday season, instead of the types of gifts you would normally give to your grandchildren, you may instead want to think of stocks to buy for your grandchildren. Doing so could end up being the gift that keeps on giving, in more ways than one.

title: 5 Relatively Secure And Cheap Dividend Stocks To Invest In - December 2023
text: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight five large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying companies offering large discounts to their historical norms. We go over our filtering process to select just five conservative DGI stocks from more than 7,500 companies that are traded on U.S. exchanges, including OTC networks. In addition to the primary list that yields just over 3%, we present two other groups of five DGI stocks each, with the goal of moderate to high yields.
